yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Securing_the_Supply_Chain_How_SentinelOn {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Securing the Supply Chain: How SentinelOne®’s AI EDR Stops the Axios Attack Auto"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-03"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-09" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "SentinelOne" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202632173__Azure_SRE_Agent_Informatio {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-32173 - Azure SRE Agent Information Disclosure Vulnerability"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-03"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-32173" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202632211__Azure_MCP_Server_Informati {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-32211 - Azure MCP Server Information Disclosure Vulnerability"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-03"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-32211" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202632213__Azure_AI_Foundry_Elevation {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-32213 - Azure AI Foundry Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-03"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-32213" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202633105__Microsoft_Azure_Kubernetes {
    meta:

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 136 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 117 as HIGH risk. 43 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-CYB-01, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Address 43 CISA KEV-listed vulnerabilities under active exploitation
Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs

key_recommendations.recommendation: Conduct threat hunting exercises based on generated hunt hypotheses
key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
